features.name: memory write with partial-bit feedback via ternary
features.description: Code should include a memory write operation where a ternary operator selects between new data and a feedback path that reads only a single bit from the same memory address being written, using bit replication to expand it to full width

features.name: memory read-to-write feedback with narrow bit extraction
features.description: Code should include a memory where the write operation reads from the same address being written, but only extracts a narrow slice (one bit) of the read data for use in the feedback path, with the rest of the bits being unused in the feedback
features.snippet:
wire bit0 = mem[wa][0];
mem[wa] <= {4{sel ? wd : bit0}};
